verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Can you see how we are surrounded By so great a cloud of witnesses Those who paid the price The supreme sacrifice Those of whom whit world was not worthy

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let us run, run, run the race with endurance Laying aside every weight Casting aside every sin Let us run, run, fixing our eyes on the Son Looking to Him, finishing what we've begun Let us run

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And can you see now we are entrusted With continuing what others started They have passed the baton Straight and fast till we've won We will run for Him who is holy.
